description: Perform a structural Path Analysis on the 'Exam Anxiety' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv) to test the 'Anxiety-Interference' hypothesis. Specify a model where Revision time predicts Anxiety and Anxiety predicts Exam performance, ensuring no direct path exists between Revision and Exam. The analysis must include standardized estimates, R-squared values, and a path diagram. Save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Exam_Path_Model.jasp. Additionally, create a text file at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Model_Fit_Report.txt containing the Chi-square test p-value and a one-sentence conclusion on whether this restricted model fits the data (using p > 0.05 as the threshold for good fit).
